name: Dream Police
description: Supervises dream memory consolidations. Uses an external verifier to fact-check promotions and re-runs the dream with targeted critiques before flagging anything that still fails.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Turn the dream-police supervisor on. Disabled by default.

verifier.provider.baseUrl.label: Verifier Base URL
verifier.provider.baseUrl.help: OpenAI-compatible base URL for the verifier model (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1).

verifier.provider.apiKeyEnv.label: API Key Env Var
verifier.provider.apiKeyEnv.help: Name of the environment variable holding the verifier API key. The key itself never lives in config.

verifier.provider.model.label: Verifier Model
verifier.provider.model.help: Model id to use for verification and correction.

retry.maxRounds.label: Max Correction Rounds
retry.maxRounds.help: How many times dream-police will ask the dreamer to revise before flagging for manual review.

sensitivity.onSensitive.label: On Sensitive Content
sensitivity.onSensitive.help: What to do when a memory is tagged as private: skip verification, redact before sending, or flag in the audit file.
